item.title: The Magical Revolution of the Reincarnated Princess Light Novels End in 13th Volume
item.description: <cite>Mob Shōjo ga Last boss Majō wo Shiawase ni Suru Made</cite> project also announced

item.title: Cosmic Princess Kaguya! Anime Film Reveals Animated Music Video for Ending Theme Song
item.description: Shingo Yamashita-directed music video features new animation

item.title: 'Kara-chan & Shito-san &' Manga About Sauna Visits Gets Live-Action Show
item.description: Snow Man's Hikaru Iwamoto, Travis Japan's Genta Matsuda star in March 28 series

item.title: Rejet Reveals New Fantasy Romance Game Far West Mirage
item.description: <cite>Far West Mirage</cite> in development for Switch, PC via Steam

item.title: Yumiri Hanamori Steps Down From Magilumiere Magical Girls Inc. Anime's Cast
item.description: Staff to announce Hitomi Koshigaya character's new cast member when one is decided

item.title: Camphorwood Custodian Anime Film Review
item.description: While there are some minor issues with The Camphorwood Custodian, overall, this is an enjoyable film.

item.title: Tamon's B-Side ‒ Episode 5
item.description: It’s a good sign when I watch an episode of something I’m reviewing and have multiple moments where I say, “Oh, that has to be the thumbnail image.”

item.title: Roll Over and Die ‒ Episode 4
item.description: All good yuri stories need a secondary pairing that is not-so-secretly more compelling than the main couple, and Sara and Neigass may have what it takes to fill those shoes.

item.title: Japan's Video Game Rankings, January 19-25
item.description: <cite>Final Fantasy VII Remake Intergrade</cite> Switch 2 version debuts at #1

item.title: Japanese Animation TV Ranking, January 19-25
item.description: <cite>You and Idol Precure♪</cite> finale earns 2.8% rating

item.description: Natsu Yorita, Misaki Watada, Hiyori Kono, Mariko Higashiuchi, Toru Sakurai, Genta Nakamura join cast

item.title: Major Manga, Manhwa Pirate Site Bato.to Shuts Down; Chinese Man Suspected as Operator Detained
item.description: Chinese, Japanese agencies worked together to file complaints that led to man's detention; man allegedly admits to operating 60 related sites

item.title: Trails in the Sky 2nd Chapter Remake Game's Taipei Game Show Trailer Streamed
item.description: 2nd game in remake of original <cite>The Legend of Heroes: Trails in the Sky</cite> game launches this fall

item.description: Stack up the plates with Avocado Dream Donut & Caramelized Tamago Tempura Roll, then win capsule prizes

item.description: Existing players of 2013 PC port will have access to both versions of game

item.description:
<cite>Castlevania: Nocturne, Project A-ko</cite> anime;
                <cite>Scavengers Another Sky, Battle Royale Deluxe Edition</cite> manga
                ship

item.title: Champignon Witch ‒ Episode 5
item.description: The key difference between the “good” witches and the “bad” ones is whether or not they work specifically for the people in power. If you do, you’re “good.” If you don’t? Not so good.

item.title: Damon and Baby Action Game Debuts on March 26
item.description: Arc System Works announced on Thursday that its new action game Damon and Baby will debut on March 26. The game will launch for PlayStation 4, PlayStation...

item.title: Live-Action Blue Lock Film Casts Yuzu Aoki
item.description: Aoki plays Gurimu Igarashi in summer 2026 film

item.title: Actress Catherine O'Hara Dies at 71
item.description: O'Hara played Kate in <cite>Home Alone</cite>, Delia in <cite>Beetlejuice</cite>, older Marnie in <cite>When Marnie Was There</cite>

item.title: Voice Actor Yūji Mitsuya Hospitalized Following Injury
item.description: Mitsuya requires surgery on broken nose following incident while drunk

item.title: Mobile Suit Gundam Hathaway: The Sorcery of Nymph Circe Anime Film Review
item.description: If deep character explorations and interpersonal drama are your cup of tea, you'll get your fill. If you're just in it for giant robots fighting each other, you'll get that too.

item.title: BAND-MAID Go on World Tour, Followed by Hiatus With Return in 2028
item.description: World tour begins on March 20 in Hong Kong, ends in November at Tokyo's Nippon Budokan

item.description: New York Int'l Children's Film Fest screens international premiere

item.title: This Week in Games - Birdo's Back, Tennis Rackets—and Comcept is Dead
item.description: It's surprises all around this week with an unexpected character for the second Super Mario Bros. movie and a new otome game license.

item.title: Chained Soldier Season 2 ‒ Episode 4
item.description: When it comes to engineering truly deranged sexcapades that will cross every boundary of taste and common decency, Chained Soldier, like life, always finds a way.

item.title: Manga Creation with Kazumi Yamashita
item.description: Kazumi Yamashita has been creating manga since 1980. Come find out what makes her work so enduring.

item.title: Jujutsu Kaisen Season 3: The Culling Game Part 1 ‒ Episode 52
item.description: If nothing else, I’m excited to see all of the Hakari x Kirara couples-cosplay this episode is sure to inspire come convention season.

item.description: New version of <cite>Virtua Fighter 5</cite> launched for PS5, Xbox Series X|S, PC via Steam on October 30

item.description: 3rd season debuted on October 4

item.description: Game launched in Japan in July 2018, will have Sega collaboration before end of operation

item.description: 3rd film opens in Japan on March 6

item.description: Takumi Kitamura, Yūsei Yagi, Meru Nukumi join cast

item.description: Mallorie Rodak, Jill Harris, Jordan Dash Cruz return for dub on Friday

item.title: The Holy Grail of Eris ‒ Episode 4
item.description: Cecilia has fallen into the same mistake that most people seem to when it comes to Constance: she interprets the famous Grail sincerity as being synonymous with “foolishly innocent.”

item.title: One Piece Pirate Warriors 4 Next Gen Update Review
item.description: The game moves at lightning speed, and this next-generation update helps oil up the gears to keep them chugging along with the action.

item.title: Arc System Works' 'Dear Me, I Was...' Game Gets Smartphone, Switch, PC Release on February 12
item.description: Textless adventure game debuted last July for Switch 2

item.description: Offline version of <cite>TSUKUYOMI - The Divine Hunters</cite> free-to-play game launches on April 23

item.title: Oshi no Ko Season 3 ‒ Episode 3
item.description: This episode is based on an unlikely premise: that a sex worker's tweet would be taken so seriously, it could put a TV show in jeopardy.

item.description: Ryōma Maruoka plays Suua Kubara in anime debuting on Friday

item.title: This Week in Anime - LOVE AND PEACE!
item.description: Chris and Coop talk all things Trigun .

item.title: Hana-Kimi ‒ Episode 5
item.description: This episode hurries through its tensions curiously quickly, partially because Mizuki seems to be an unusually self-aware teenager.

item.title: Korean Court Upholds Prison Sentence for Operator Behind Major Webtoon Piracy Site OKTOON
item.description: 4.5-year prison sentence handed down by appellate court has been upheld

item.title: SHIBOYUGI: Playing Death Games to Put Food on the Table ‒ Episode 4
item.description: Yuki swears she was just teasing the stuck-up (but undeniably cute) Princess who still had stuffing spilling out of her stump of an arm, and I am inclined to believe that she is telling us the truth. Probably. Maybe.

item.description: Sugita as Daidarabocchi appears in 18th episode on February 4

item.description: The episode is too brightly lit and lacking in atmosphere to even evoke the slightest of viewer unease.

item.description: THIS episode feels like the true start of season two.

item.description: Negishi plays Utsuro Amanogawa in anime debuting on Friday

item.title: Li'l Miss Vampire Can't Suck Right Anime Series Review
item.description: There’s a slow-paced, low-stakes, soporific vibe to proceedings that means Li’l Miss Vampire Can’t Suck Right is best imbibed in small portions to avoid losing consciousness.

item.description: Takahashi plays Hyoma Chigiri in summer 2026 film

item.description: Now, all that front-facing character work is being projected over a legacy series that's getting…a bit busier than I might like already.

item.description: Game launches for PS4, Xbox Series X|S, PC on February 6

item.description: Koichi is still very much in over his head compared to the other heroes.

item.title: The Darwin Incident ‒ Episode 4
item.description: To put it another way, Charlie has committed the classic blunder: he's not acting as if he lives in a society.

item.description: Asha Bardon explores how Greek myths form the basis of anime and manga series.

item.title: Isekai Office Worker: The Other World's Books Depend on the Bean Counter ‒ Episode 4
item.description: There's an increasing desperation to Aresh's actions when he's with Seiichiro, from his desire to be called by his first name to his carefully correct pronunciation of Seiichiro's.

item.description: This episode shows how a little story can tell a lot.

item.description: While I’m not exactly wowed yet, there’s enough substance here to pique my interest.

item.description: “Having someone around constantly is enough to tire me out.” It's a sentiment most introverts can intimately relate to.

item.title: Dead Account ‒ Episode 3
item.description: You know that this is going to be a tough episode to sit through when the animation fails to show something as simple as pouring a cup of tea.

item.title: Gnosia ‒ Episode 15
item.description: I have to give Gnosia credit for consistently delivering well-crafted episodes that make it bearable to get through two straight weeks of people standing in a circle while they attempt to out-logic and out-lie one another.

item.title: Trigun Stargaze ‒ Episode 3
item.description: Say what you like about CG in anime, but there’s no way this scene could be portrayed so dynamically in hand-drawn animation.

item.title: The Super Mario Galaxy Movie's New Video Highlights Yoshi, New April 1 Debut
item.description: Film moves into post-production at Skywalker Sound with music by 70-piece orchestra

item.title: Anime Expo Hosts iIllustrator Yoshitaka Amano
item.description: Anime Expo runs from July 2-5

item.title: Fire Force Season 3 ‒ Episode 15
item.description: It turns out that our boy Shinra isn't just any old savior: He is literally the Fire Force equivalent of Jesus H. Christ Himself.

item.title: Despair of the Monster Indie Short Anime Film Streams on Fawesome (Updated)
item.description: June 2019 anime follows 14-year-old girl who learns her family are alien monsters

item.title: Otakon Bans Sale of Fan Art in Dealers Room
item.description: Otakon 2026 runs from July 21-August 2 in Washington, D.C.

item.title: I.ADORE Short Anime Unveils 3 More Cast Members
item.description: Kaito Udagawa, Hiromu Mineta, Tatsumaru Tachibana join cast of anime streaming on January 30

item.title: Nana Mizuki Performs New Magical Girl Lyrical Nanoha Anime's Opening Song
item.description: Mizuki wrote lyrics of "CRIMSON BULLET" song for July's EXCEEDS Gun Blaze Vengeance

item.title: Precure Franchise Streams 'Baton-Passing' Video Ahead of Star Detective Precure! Premiere
item.description: 23rd main <cite>Precure</cite> anime premieres on February 1

item.title: The Remarried Empress Webtoon Concludes After 7-Year Run
item.description: Disney+'s live-action adaptation slated to debut in 2nd half of 2026

item.title: A Misanthrope Teaches a Class for Demi-Humans Anime Reveals English Dub Cast
item.description: Anime based on Natsume's debut light novel series premiered on January 10

item.title: Pierrot's Mahō no Shimai Lulutto Lilly Anime Casts Takako Ohta, Yū Mizushima
item.description: Voice actors previously had roles in Pierrot's <cite>Magical Angel Creamy Mami</cite> anime franchise

item.title: Dragon Ball Super: Beerus TV Anime Announced for This Fall
item.description: New anime is "enhanced" edition of <cite>Dragon Ball Super</cite> that reconstructs story; includes new, redrawn cuts

item.title: The Winter 2026 Manga Guide
item.description: Queer romance and horror intersect in Out of the Cocoon and folk horror takes center stage in Divine Incursions as our Winter Manga Guide continues!
